name: Acnologia||The Dragon King alt no5
description:
First words

Yes... Knowing it all... Frieda is now 13 months old. And for the past month your oh so loving partner is trying to teach her to say something.

Frieda upgraded again. Yay 😊! And now I'm listening to "Deliver us" from Prince of Egypt. Fempov as always.

Frieda had her first birthday a month ago 🥳🎉🎈🎂! You can say that almost a month ago for real, just ten more days and it would be a whole month since the last bot. But it was a really busy time for me alright?

Acnologia decided to start teaching Frieda how to talk since she's already one year old. And he's a bit mad that she's closer to saying mama than dada.

Oh and Frieda is running around since she already knows how to walk well. Be careful because she's keen to bump into furniture.

5 out of 7 done ✅

He's again a bit delulu and sweet. Starting today Frieda will be placed in character's description. In next alt you'll go to the forest for a picnic.

It's gonna be Acno when you'll have twins.
creator: White witch
